## Meeting Purpose

[Walkthrough HubSpot implementation progress and discuss next steps for GrowthX's CRM transition.](https://fathom.video/share/Kxg5nEnDSWcGs3sxDgGV519q2-9r5MeT?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [HubSpot go-live planned for Monday; team to stop using Adio CRM on Sunday night](https://fathom.video/share/Kxg5nEnDSWcGs3sxDgGV519q2-9r5MeT?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [Inbound lead flow, deal stages, and key fields have been implemented in HubSpot](https://fathom.video/share/Kxg5nEnDSWcGs3sxDgGV519q2-9r5MeT?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [Line items and deal associations will be used to track complex deal structures (sprints + growth)](https://fathom.video/share/Kxg5nEnDSWcGs3sxDgGV519q2-9r5MeT?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)
  - [Custom views and required fields will be set up to ensure data accuracy and ease of use](https://fathom.video/share/Kxg5nEnDSWcGs3sxDgGV519q2-9r5MeT?tab=summary&timestamp=2228.0)

## Topics

### HubSpot Implementation Progress

  - [Inbound lead flow has been moved from Adio to HubSpot with enhanced enrichment data](https://fathom.video/share/Kxg5nEnDSWcGs3sxDgGV519q2-9r5MeT?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Deal stages have been imported, including a change from "meeting booked" to "engaged"](https://fathom.video/share/Kxg5nEnDSWcGs3sxDgGV519q2-9r5MeT?tab=summary&timestamp=1412.0)
  - [Key fields from Adio have been ported over, including SOW and contract type](https://fathom.video/share/Kxg5nEnDSWcGs3sxDgGV519q2-9r5MeT?tab=summary&timestamp=1752.0)
  - [Line items functionality will be used to track complex deal structures (e.g., 3-month sprint + 9-month growth)](https://fathom.video/share/Kxg5nEnDSWcGs3sxDgGV519q2-9r5MeT?tab=summary&timestamp=1927.0)
  - [Deal associations will be implemented to connect related deals (e.g., sprint and growth execution)](https://fathom.video/share/Kxg5nEnDSWcGs3sxDgGV519q2-9r5MeT?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)

### Data Migration and Cleanup

  - [All existing growth and sprint deal types (closed-won, closed-lost, open) have been imported to HubSpot](https://fathom.video/share/Kxg5nEnDSWcGs3sxDgGV519q2-9r5MeT?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [Priority for further imports: active open deals and closed-won (current customers)](https://fathom.video/share/Kxg5nEnDSWcGs3sxDgGV519q2-9r5MeT?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [Churned customers and historical closed-lost deals are lower priority for import](https://fathom.video/share/Kxg5nEnDSWcGs3sxDgGV519q2-9r5MeT?tab=summary&timestamp=2645.0)
  - [Backfilling of deals that don't match growth/sprint style still needed](https://fathom.video/share/Kxg5nEnDSWcGs3sxDgGV519q2-9r5MeT?tab=summary&timestamp=1885.0)

### New Processes and Features

  - [Calendar and Gmail integration set up for Kyle, to be done for other team members](https://fathom.video/share/Kxg5nEnDSWcGs3sxDgGV519q2-9r5MeT?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [HubSpot Chrome extension to be installed for easy data entry and activity tracking](https://fathom.video/share/Kxg5nEnDSWcGs3sxDgGV519q2-9r5MeT?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)
  - [Custom views to be created based on Kyle's feedback for most relevant fields](https://fathom.video/share/Kxg5nEnDSWcGs3sxDgGV519q2-9r5MeT?tab=summary&timestamp=2224.0)
  - [Required fields and validation rules to be implemented for data accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/Kxg5nEnDSWcGs3sxDgGV519q2-9r5MeT?tab=summary&timestamp=2235.0)
  - [Automation for renewal deal creation to be set up](https://fathom.video/share/Kxg5nEnDSWcGs3sxDgGV519q2-9r5MeT?tab=summary&timestamp=2974.0)

### Reporting and Data Management

  - [Coefficient tool ($100/month) recommended for advanced reporting and data syncing between HubSpot and Google Sheets](https://fathom.video/share/Kxg5nEnDSWcGs3sxDgGV519q2-9r5MeT?tab=summary&timestamp=1725.0)
  - [Discussion on how to handle contract changes (e.g., early cancellations) in the CRM](https://fathom.video/share/Kxg5nEnDSWcGs3sxDgGV519q2-9r5MeT?tab=summary&timestamp=2889.0)
  - [Slack notifications for deal stage changes and closed-won deals to be implemented in HubSpot](https://fathom.video/share/Kxg5nEnDSWcGs3sxDgGV519q2-9r5MeT?tab=summary&timestamp=3197.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Joe to create enablement videos for key HubSpot processes (e.g., line items, deal associations)](https://fathom.video/share/Kxg5nEnDSWcGs3sxDgGV519q2-9r5MeT?tab=summary&timestamp=2323.0)
  - [Kyle to provide feedback on desired fields for custom deal and contact views](https://fathom.video/share/Kxg5nEnDSWcGs3sxDgGV519q2-9r5MeT?tab=summary&timestamp=2255.0)
  - [Joe to finalize data import on Sunday night before Monday go-live](https://fathom.video/share/Kxg5nEnDSWcGs3sxDgGV519q2-9r5MeT?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [Tyler to be onboarded to HubSpot on Monday](https://fathom.video/share/Kxg5nEnDSWcGs3sxDgGV519q2-9r5MeT?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
  - [Bridget to work with Alice on backfilling historical deals and renewals](https://fathom.video/share/Kxg5nEnDSWcGs3sxDgGV519q2-9r5MeT?tab=summary&timestamp=2562.0)
  - [Joe to implement Slack notifications for deal stages and closed-won deals](https://fathom.video/share/Kxg5nEnDSWcGs3sxDgGV519q2-9r5MeT?tab=summary&timestamp=3197.0)
  - [Team to start using HubSpot exclusively from Monday, stopping Adio usage on Sunday night](https://fathom.video/share/Kxg5nEnDSWcGs3sxDgGV519q2-9r5MeT?tab=summary&timestamp=2350.0)
